description: Hand-authored synthetic augmented Python code-completion prompts with varied snippets.

documents.text:
Complete this Python expression:
values = [1, 2, 3]
result = sum(values)

Complete the final token in this indexing example.
letters = ['a', 'b', 'c']
last = letters[-1]

Complete the boolean expression.
text = 'hello'
answer = text.startswith('he')
